_comment: Golden fixture for unicode and edge-case handling. Tests CJK, emoji, accented chars, empty strings, null values.
edge_cases: CJK characters serialize as escaped unicode in canonical JSON
Emoji (U+1F600) serializes as surrogate pair in JSON
Accented chars serialize as escaped unicode
Empty string serializes as empty quotes, not null or missing
null value serializes as null keyword, not empty string
Empty context {} is still included in the signing body
